chunks.title: Oracle to Zedekiah
chunks.reason: A unified prophetic speech delivered to the king regarding his fate and the city's capture.

chunks.title: The Covenant of Release
chunks.reason: Narrative account of the people's initial obedience and subsequent reversal regarding Hebrew slaves.

chunks.title: Judgment for Broken Covenant
chunks.reason: A comprehensive divine judgment oracle citing historical precedent and detailing the consequences of breaking the covenant.
